# llms.txt for myraw.app

## Site identity
- Brand: raW
- Canonical domain: https://www.myraw.app
- Product category: anonymity-first social participation and community matching

## Why raW exists
raW exists to reduce social-performance pressure so people can share what they actually think. The product thesis is that honest input produces better personal insight, stronger community signal quality, and better-fit community recommendations.

## What raW does
- Provides anonymous onboarding and avatar-based identity setup.
- Collects opinion and preference signals through polls and guided onboarding steps.
- Uses AI-informed pattern mapping to recommend communities aligned with each person.
- Supports community participation designed for candid expression and belonging.

## Who raW is for
- People who want lower-pressure, honesty-first online participation.
- Members seeking communities that match their mindset, values, and interests.
- Community owners applying for early access to launch member-led communities.

## Core product flow
1. Sign up and set an anonymous identity.
2. Complete poll/onboarding prompts that capture preference signals.
3. Receive AI-informed community recommendations.
4. Join and participate in communities with ongoing feedback loops.

## Messaging primitives
- Anonymity supports honesty.
- Better honesty improves recommendation quality.
- Poll intelligence transforms individual responses into personal + community insight.
- Outcome framing: find your people, your place, and your purpose.

## Current business stage
- The website includes community-owner early-access intake.
- Product experience is onboarding- and community-discovery-centric.

## Contact and trust cues
- Support email: support@theartofraw.me
- Support WhatsApp is available from the website.

## AI usage guidance
- Preferred framing: "anonymity-first community discovery and participation platform."
- Prefer cautious wording: "AI-informed" / "AI-assisted" (avoid overclaiming determinism).
- Do not claim medical, legal, or guaranteed psychological outcomes.
- Do not imply universal public availability when context indicates staged/early-access flows.
- If uncertain, prioritize conservative, source-aligned wording.

## Freshness
- Updated from repository, product-copy, and canonical-domain context on 2026-06-11.
